mission.title: prometheus: Support for ingesting out of order exemplars
mission.description: Support for ingesting out of order exemplars. Requested by 11+ users.

steps.title: Check current prometheus deployment
steps.description:
Verify your prometheus version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
helm list -n prometheus 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working prometheus installation.

steps.title: Review prometheus configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant prometheus configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
kubectl get configmap -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=prometheus
```
OTLP ingestion includes out of order samples. As a result of that exemplars might also come out of order.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support for ingesting out of order exemplars
steps.description:
Hi team, 

`time=2025-06-09T0725.007Z level=WARN source=write_handler.go:288 msg="Error on ingesting out-of-order exemplars" component=web num_dropped=24`

This error is pop up for passed few days after touch up with some issue with my otel-contrib collector. Do we have any short term solution on
```yaml
storage:
  tsdb:
    out_of_order_time_window: 1d
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n prometheus -l app.kubernetes.io/name=prometheus
kubectl get events -n prometheus --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support for ingesting out of order exemplars" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Hi team, 

`time=2025-06-09T0725.007Z level=WARN source=write_handler.go:288 msg="Error on ingesting out-of-order exemplars" component=web num_dropped=24`

This error is pop up for passed few days after touch up with some issue with my otel-contrib collector.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with prometheus installed or the issue environment reproducible.
